score_components.formula_applied: Not applicable - this is not an FLS task

confidence_rationale: This video clearly shows an open surgical technique demonstration for uterine artery ligation (O'Leary technique), not any of the 5 standardized FLS tasks. The title screens, open surgical field, and technique shown definitively identify this as non-FLS content.
technique_summary: This video demonstrates the O'Leary technique for uterine artery ligation using open surgical approach on a training model. This is not an FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) task and therefore cannot be scored using FLS rubrics.
strengths: Clear educational demonstration of O'Leary technique
improvement_suggestions: This is an educational video, not a performance to be improved
